hero_subtitle: SFTY supports institutional digital asset businesses with private cloud deployment that secures data isolation, preserves audit evidence, enforces role-based access, and streamlines bank due diligence workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Data control becomes complex without isolation
problem_description: Institutional digital asset businesses face challenges supporting data isolation and governance in multi-tenant cloud environments. This complicates audit readiness, evidence integrity and role-based access management required for trust and oversight expectations.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates role-based access, audit logs, evidence integrity and governance into a secure private cloud environment tailored for institutional VASPs managing data isolation and regulatory oversight requirements.
workflow_title: From access controls to audit-ready evidence
workflow_description: SFTY manages role-based permissions, audit logs and evidence retention within private cloud deployments to support secure, traceable compliance and bank due diligence workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond siloed systems. Secure compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral compliance layer that connects data, enforces access governance and preserves audit-ready evidence within private cloud environments.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with secure private deployment, role-based access and audit-ready evidence to meet institutional governance and bank due diligence requirements.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support private cloud data isolation
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how role-based access controls manage compliance workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit logs preserve evidence integrity in private cloud
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY supports bank due diligence in isolated environments
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for institutional clients?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides institutional clients a compliance control layer that connects providers, policies, cases and evidence in one secure, auditable workflow tailored for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support private cloud data isolation?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports private cloud deployment with role-based access, data segregation, audit logs and governance controls to meet enterprise data isolation and secure compliance operational requirements.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs, provider outputs and evidence packages in an audit-ready format to support regulatory inspections, bank due diligence and internal review processes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools, turning their outputs into structured workflows without disrupting current compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing providers or systems?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers; it connects and orchestrates their outputs into connected workflows, evidence records and reporting for greater consistency and control.
final_title: Review private cloud deployment and governance
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports role-based access, audit evidence preservation and data isolation for institutional compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
